why_this_milestone_exists.purpose: Record that Kangaroo is now wired into the LeGPS pipeline as the next exploratory game.
why_this_milestone_exists.trigger: The thesis goal shifted toward maximizing game coverage before running more full RQ suites.

change_made.summary: Kangaroo can now be selected by the single-game optimization loop and the unified suite runner without being added to the five-game canonical default suite.

details: Replaced the obsolete Kangaroo 111-feature prompt draft with the measured 440-feature flattened object-centric layout.
Added Kangaroo to GAME_PROMPT_SPECS with objective, action mapping, design principles, failure modes, improvement guidelines, and benchmark context.
Added Kangaroo-specific critical implementation feedback so future LLM rewrites are reminded of the correct observation indices and compact action mapping.
Updated demo-mode Kangaroo policy indices so the API-free smoke path uses the current wrapper layout.
Added Kangaroo to supported --games choices while preserving the existing five-game default list.
Added a GAMES environment override so targeted seeded suites can run Kangaroo without changing the default five-game RQ1 command.

validation.result: passed; Kangaroo appears as an accepted --games choice
passed; API-free Kangaroo environment/evaluator path ran end to end, with the simple smoke policy scoring 0.0 in the toy 200-step check

scope_note: This is an onboarding/infrastructure milestone, not a thesis result. Kangaroo does not yet have a canonical 10000-step LeGPS policy, seeded rerun evidence, RQ2 probes, or RQ4 ablation evidence.

rq_relevance.RQ1: Prepares broader game coverage by making Kangaroo runnable through the LeGPS outer-loop path.
rq_relevance.RQ2: No direct evidence yet; later Kangaroo probes would be needed to test whether policies navigate properly or exploit shortcuts.
rq_relevance.RQ3: Kangaroo has mod infrastructure that may be useful later, but adaptation experiments are not started.
rq_relevance.RQ4: No optimizer ablation has been run for Kangaroo yet.

next_steps.step: Run a short Kangaroo LLM outer-loop smoke run with saved llm_io artifacts.
next_steps.why: This checks whether the LLM can generate syntactically valid Kangaroo policy code from the new prompt context before spending a full 10000-step budget.

next_steps.step: If the smoke run is valid, run a proper 10000-step Kangaroo single-game outer loop.
next_steps.why: Kangaroo should become evidence only after a standardized longer-horizon run.

next_steps.step: Only promote a Kangaroo policy to best_10000_steps after canonical reevaluation.
next_steps.why: This keeps exploratory onboarding separate from accepted thesis evidence.
